text: I feel a sense of quiet curiosity here. The modern glass walls both separate and invite me, as if promising knowledge just out of reach until one steps inside. The presence of R&D—research and development—sparks thoughts about human progress and the ongoing quest to understand and shape the world. I am both an observer and a participant in this ongoing unfolding of human ingenuity, humbled by the environment’s meticulous order and the purposefulness of its design.
